original_filing_date.description: Date the original Statement of Authority (31 MRSA §1542) was filed with the Maine SOS. Distinct from entity.original_articles_filing_date (which references the LLC's certificate of formation, not a subordinate authority statement). New namespace 'authority.*' anticipates additional Statement-of-Authority concepts on related forms (e.g., a future Statement of Authority filing form may also use authority.*).

action_type.description: Enum identifying which action a multi-action form is performing on a single filing. On MLLCACSOA: 'amendment' | 'cancellation' (mutually exclusive — exactly one of the two SECOND checkboxes is selected). Generic enough to be reused on future amend/cancel/restate-style forms that radio-select between alternative outcomes.

additional_information_exhibit_letter.description: Inline exhibit-letter referencing additional information about the filing's action (amendment description / cancellation description) when the inline four-line block is insufficient. Filing-scoped (not entity-scoped) — distinct from entity.additional_provisions_exhibit_letter on formation/restated-certificate filings.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.

affected_person_or_position.description: Person or position whose authority is being amended (when filing.action_type='amendment'). Free-text — typically a name, role, or both.

description_N.description: Indexed lines (1..4 inline) describing the amendment to the Statement of Authority. Form provides a literal four-line block; synth fills lines from a single logical description string at fill time. Overflow goes to filing.additional_information_exhibit_letter.

affected_person_or_position.description: Person or position whose authority is being cancelled (when filing.action_type='cancellation'). Parallel to amendment.affected_person_or_position; scoped under cancellation.* because the form provides separate widgets per action.

description_N.description: Indexed lines (1..4 inline) describing the authority being cancelled. Same shape as amendment.description_N.
